title: BEM-844 repair response writer
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 11:40 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
route=load('governance/state/bem843_route_after_bem842.json')
# Create a fresh explicit mailbox request that Claude must answer with CLAUDE RESPONSE marker and Decision.
mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem844_real_response_required.md')
mail.write_text('# BEM-844 | REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Date: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: provide the agreed multi-agent architecture/development protocol or BLOCKED with exact reason.'+sep+'Mandatory output file: governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem844_claude_response.md'+sep+'Mandatory header: CLAUDE RESPONSE | BEM-844'+sep+'Mandatory line: Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+'Do not write issue comments. Do not expose secrets.'+sep)
# Harden dispatcher prompt if workflow exists.
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
changed_wf=False
if wf.exists():
    txt=wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
    if 'Mandatory output file: governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem844_claude_response.md' not in txt:
        txt=txt.replace('Write response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/ with BEM id in filename.', 'Write response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/ with BEM id in filename. Mandatory output file for the latest BEM-844 request: governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem844_claude_response.md. Include header CLAUDE RESPONSE | BEM-844 and Decision line.')
        wf.write_text(txt)
        changed_wf=True
# Queue dispatcher.
q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_claude_response_dispatch.json')
q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 dispatch after forcing mandatory real Claude response file','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-844','status':'real_response_writer_path_hardened_and_dispatch_queued','route_status':route.get('status'),'mail':str(mail),'queue_file':str(q),'workflow_changed':changed_wf,'next_action':'fresh tick then verify bem844_claude_response.md real Claude response','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem844_repair_claude_response_writer_path.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem844_repair_claude_response_writer_path.md').write_text('# BEM-844 | Repair Claude Response Writer Path | QUEUED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md').write_text('Next: fresh tick and verify bem844_claude_response.md. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-844'+sep+sep+'Status: real_response_writer_path_hardened_and_dispatch_queued'+sep+'Next: tick and verify real Claude response.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem844_repair_claude_response_writer_path.json','governance/reports/bem844_repair_claude_response_writer_path.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl',str(mail),str(q)]
if changed_wf: changed.append(str(wf))
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Hardened Claude response writer path by adding explicit BEM-844 mailbox request, mandatory response file/header/decision, and queued Claude dispatcher')
"""
No issue comments.
